title: Distributor Onboarding Metrics That Predict First-Quarter Success
description: Track the early indicators that show whether a new distributor setup will scale in the first 90 days.
excerpt: Onboarding speed is not enough. These metrics help teams detect risk early and support partners before quarterly targets slip.
author: Ezupp Partner Ops

sections.text: Strong onboarding combines operational readiness and behavior signals. Measure both to avoid false confidence.
Use a readiness score before go-live

items: Sales rep login and usage consistency in the first two weeks.

sections.text: Order volume can spike from initial stocking. Watch order repetition rate and line-item diversity to confirm true adoption.
